name: guard-post
summary: Alert guard station — tight, utilitarian, sightline to the controlled passage.

primary_palette.note: gatehouse with a raised iron gate
watch station at a table — sightline to the door
open-air guard post, dominant fire keeping watchers warm

story_prompts: two bored guards mid-card-game, weapons within reach but not in hand
abandoned post, weapons still on the rack but dust everywhere
double-manned watch after a recent breach — extra stools, extra tension
anti_patterns: never place a guard post bigger than a small living room
the table should have line-of-sight to the controlled doorway
weapon racks go on the wall opposite the door so guards grab and turn
